headline: Stop Sunday snacking, start closing the gap
summary: You're -0.26 kg/week behind target; today's portion discipline and intentional exercise combat this drift that costs you dearly.
details: No emotional snacking today—stick to Huel portions only, avoid vegan 'treats' that sabotage progress. Execute 45 minutes on the rowing machine to create your calorie deficit. Today matters because you're 326 days behind schedule; every Sunday you reclaim prevents another lost week toward your 88 kg goal.
